title: minuartia fastigiata subsp. funkii
intro: Minuartia fastigiata subsp. funkii, also known as a subspecies of the Rock Carnation, is a flowering plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Minuartia fastigiata subsp. funkii include its ability to relieve congestion, soothe sore throats, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a natural and holistic approach to managing various health concerns.
